name: arkit-avatar-viewer
description: Track B1 (FLAME 2023 Open, CC-BY-4.0) viewer: load out/head_arkit.glb in three.js and drive up to 52 MediaPipe FaceLandmarker ARKit blendshape categories against the FLAME-supported morph targets by exact, case-sensitive categoryName -> morphTargetDictionary lookup. The GLB's morphTargetDictionary is the runtime source of truth; tongueOut/cheekPuff/cheekSquintLeft/cheekSquintRight (a-priori unsupported) plus any pod-demoted shapes are honest no-ops — logged for qa-verifier, never aliased or renamed.
